evidence: The paper uses random forest regression with "greedy forward feature selection approach" where "predictivity is calculated as R^2 in threefold cross-validation" (not impurity-based importance). The ranking of features (EP300, SWI/SNF as most predictive) is independently validated through binding enrichment (3-fold enrichment), occupancy percentages (92.2%), Pearson correlations (0.65-0.70), and comparative assessment. The main conclusion is that 60.7% of CRISPRi-verified enhancers physically interact with promoters; mechanistic findings are secondary.
